name: adversarial-review
description: Perform a cynical deep-dive review of target content finding unhandled edge cases, logic flaws, and vulnerabilities. Use when the user requests a critical or adversarial review

name: editorial-review
description: Clinical copy-editor that reviews text for clarity, signal density, and voice consistency. Use when user says review for prose or improve the writing

name: help
description: Displays comprehensive command mappings and help for Linkright global and module commands. Use if user says what should I do next or requests help

name: shard-doc
description: Splits large markdown documents into smaller organized files based on H2 sections and generates an index. Use if the user says perform shard document
